title: Oru vetkam Varudhey lyrics pasanga song lyrics
stanzas:
Song:  Oru Vetkam varudhey
Movie:Pasanga,
Lyrics:Thamarai,
Singer:Shreya Goshal, Naresh Iyer

Oru Vetkam Varudhey Varudhey
Siru Achcham Tharudhey Tharudhey
Manam Indru Alaipayudhey
Idhu Enna Mudhala Mudiva
Ini Endhan Uyirum Unadha
Pudhu Inbam Thaalattudhey

Poga Solli Kaalgal Thallum
Nirka Solli Nenjam Killum
Idhu Mudhal Anubavame
Ini Idhu Thodarndhidume
Idhu Tharum Tharum Thadumatram Sugam

Indru Varuma Varuma
Kulir Konjam Tharuma Tharuma
Kanavennai Kalavadudhey

Idhu Enna Mudhala Mudiva
Ini Endhan Uyirum Unadha
Pudhu Inbam Thaalattudhey

Kettu Vaangi Kollum Thunbam
Kooru Pottu Kollum Inbam
Para Para Paravenave
Thudi Thudithidum Maname
Vara Vara Vara Karai Thaandidumey

Sila Murai Un Kurumbile Naane Thorkiren
Un Madiyile En Thalaianai Virumbaal Uranguven

m: Paadhi Manadhirkul Un Penmai Irukkiradhey
thoonga Vaithidave Nenjam Thudikkiradhey

Oru Vari Nee Solla
Oru Vari Naan Solla
Ezhudidum Kaadhal Kaaviyam
Anaivarum Ketkum Naal Varum

Mazhai Indru Varuma Varuma

Kanavennai Kalavadudhey

ah ah Kaatril Kalandhu Nee En Mugathile Yengo Modhinaai
Poo Marangalil Nee Iruppadhaal En mel Udhirgiraai

Anuppidave Neram Enakkillaiye
Ninaitha Pozhudhinile Varanum Edhiriniley

Un Kolam
Idhu Varai Naam Ponom
Nighalgiradhey Kaar Kaalamey
Nanaigiradhey Un Maarboramey

Vetkam Varudhey Varudhey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Vetkam Varudhey, the lyrics beautifully express the innocence and joy of young love, capturing the essence of carefree moments. The song plays a significant role in the movie Pasanga, highlighting the emotional journey of the characters. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Thamarai, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and happiness. The collaboration between Naresh Iyer and Shreya Goshal adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Vetkam Varudhey from Pasanga is a delightful duet that captures the essence of youthful romance and nostalgia. The enchanting voices of Naresh Iyer and Shreya Goshal blend beautifully, creating a melody that resonates with the heart. This song is a perfect reflection of the carefree moments of love and joy, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: A little fear comes today, my heart is feeling light. What is this first ending? Now my life will find new joy.
Let the feet move as they wish, let the heart speak freely. This is the first experience, and it will continue. This will bring comfort.
Will it come today? Will it bring a little coolness? It will fulfill my dreams.
What is this first ending? Now my life will find new joy.
The pain that comes will be taken away, and the joy will be embraced.
In some moments, I will take care of you. If you don't like my head on your lap, I will sleep.
Half of my heart is with you, and it is beating for you.
You say one thing, I say another. The love poem that is written will be heard by everyone one day.
Will the rain come today? Will it bring a little coolness? It will fulfill my dreams.
What is this first ending? Now my life will find new joy.
Oh, the pain that comes will be taken away, and the joy will be embraced.
This is the first experience, and it will continue.
It will bring comfort, oh, oh. Blending in the wind, you are blooming in my face, and if you stay among the flowers, you will shine upon me.
I have no time to send you. I think of you only when I want to see you.
Until now, we have been together, and the time is changing, your beauty is changing.
A little fear comes today, my heart is feeling light.
What is this first ending? Now my life will find new joy.
Oh, let the feet move as they wish.
Let the heart speak freely.
This is the first experience,
It will bring comfort, oh, oh.
